name: sql-dialect-abstraction
description: SqlBackend uses @ucast/sql's pg dialect options object with escapeIdentifier() method for PostgreSQL double-quoting. The dialect pattern is: { ...pg, joinRelation: () => false }. DDL should follow similar pattern with a dialect options interface.
recommendation: Define SqlDialect interface with: name, escapeIdentifier(), typeMap, supportedFeatures. Create pg and sqlite dialect implementations.
